items.title: ‘They’ve abandoned us’: Anger as race to find survivors in Venezuela earthquake runs out
items.desc: Relatives rail against slow response of local authorities, with hopes fading fast amid desperate rescue efforts

items.title: Micro, small units get CM’s policy push on MSME Day
items.desc: Rajasthan CM Bhajanlal Sharma unveils Industrial Policy 2026 on MSME Day, launching haats, ODOP aid, startup VC, and new MSME subsidies.

items.title: Wife cannot be denied maintenance for seeking divorce after harassment: Bombay HC
items.desc: Bombay High Court Nagpur held wife seeking divorce after cruelty can’t be denied Section 125 CrPC maintenance; upheld ₹5,000–₹7,000/month, arrears due.

items.title: Taylor Swift's wedding performers revealed... including a heartthrob with a VERY special connection to her past
items.desc: Details of the nuptials have been kept so assiduously under wraps that Swift, 36, is said to have taken the precaution of inviting guests over the phone.

items.title: Nashik & Trimbakeshwar will be split into tightly controlled sectors for Amrit Snan period: Kumbh Mela Authority commiss
items.desc: Nashik, Trimbakeshwar to be split into self-contained sectors for Simhastha Kumbh peak Amrit Snan days, banning inter-sector movement for crowd safety.

items.title: Satej Patil attacks Centre over alleged corruption linked to Ram Mandir, say BJP’s sole agenda is to make money
items.desc: Congress MLC Satej Patil alleges BJP corruption in Ayodhya Ram Mandir works, questions SIT and resignations, and urges longer Maharashtra voter mapping with more BLOs.

items.title: Hezbollah rejects US-brokered Israel-Lebanon deal
items.desc: Hezbollah leader Naim Qassem rejected a US-brokered security agreement between Lebanon and Israel on Saturday a day after it was signed, describing it as a surrender to Israel.

items.title: Vanilla Ice’s Freedom 250 Concert in D.C. Canceled Due to ‘Inclement Weather’ That Doesn’t Materialize
items.desc: There was no measurable rain in Washington, D.C. Friday night, but even a threat of scattered showers was enough to melt Vanilla Ice’s planned performance on the National Lawn as part of the Freedom 250 events, as the free show was called off hours before it …

items.title: Khidrapur villagers enforce lockdown to protest ASI curbs, over 1000 tourists return without visiting Kopeshwar Temple
items.desc: Khidrapur villagers impose indefinite bandh over ASI rules; roads shut and Kopeshwar Temple closed, forcing 1,200 tourists to return without visiting.

items.title: Gang luring youth with lift offer busted; couple held
items.desc: Panchkula Police arrest husband-wife duo in lift-pretext robbery; youth forced to withdraw Rs 22,000, robbed of phone and bike; hunt on for other suspects.

items.title: Banners projecting BJP’s Malhar Patil as “future MP” spark political row in Dharashiv
items.desc: BJP ‘Future MP’ banners in Dharashiv promote Malhar Patil with #MP2029, fuelling Mahayuti seat tussle with new Shinde Sena MP Rajenimbalkar.

items.title: LAST BRUSHSTROKE TODAY: VIDARBHARANG 2026 SET TO CLOSE
items.desc: Vidarbharang 2026 ends today at Rangayan Gallery, Chitnavis Centre, Nagpur; 15 local artists exhibit watercolour landscapes and photos, plus live ‘Rangsamvad’ at 7:30am.

items.title: Young swap noise and partying for peace & spirituality
items.desc: Gen Z and young professionals in India are choosing spiritual travel over party hotspots, boosting demand for Kedarnath, Varanasi, Rishikesh and Tirupati.

items.title: Nagpur a learning lab for cops, says outgoing CP Singal
items.desc: Outgoing Nagpur CP Ravinder Singal calls city a “learning lab,” urges empathetic policing, cites fewer murders, MPDA/MCOCA actions, and Mission Mukti.

items.title: Hezbollah rejects deal with Israel, which expects ‘extended stay’ in Lebanon
items.desc:
Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu on Saturday declared his country's agreement with Lebanon "a blow to Iran and Hezbollah", while the militant group's leader Naim Qassem declared it void.

items.title: NEP 4th-year honours admissions face delays as colleges await clarity from SPPU
items.desc: NEP fourth-year honours admissions are delayed at SPPU autonomous colleges over non-grant fees, scholarship mapping and missing final guidelines, despite university assurance.

items.title: Venezuela earthquake death toll passes 1,400 as survival window narrows
items.desc: The death toll from two earthquakes in Venezuela has climbed beyond 1,400, as searches for survivors intensify during the remaining hours of the window for survival.

items.title: Cong alleges corruption in municipal property mutations
items.desc: Congress alleges multi-crore property mutation and notary scam in Indore Municipal Corporation, citing late-night logins for 370 transfers; IMC has ordered a probe.
